title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 479.090 - Prosecutions based on information only, proceedings
text:
479.090.  Prosecutions based on information only, proceedings. — All prosecutions for the violation of municipal ordinances shall be instituted by information and may be based upon a complaint.  Proceedings shall be in accordance with the supreme court rules governing practice and procedure in proceedings before municipal judges.
(L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
